---
title: "Margaret Alexis Bell"
---

## Margaret Alexis Bell

**Dates:** (1818-1889)

### Description

friend of Ruskin and headmistress of Winnington Hall School

### Biography

See <i>The Winnington Letters: John Ruskin\'s Correspondence with Margaret Alexis Bell</i> (1969).

### Letters

- Letter from Dec 30th [1866?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
